project.name: Anna's Farm — Common Space Entry Landscape
project.deliverable_summary: Professional client proposal (PDF + HTML one-pager) with line-item estimate, GIS site context, site photos, AI mockup renders, parametric Houdini 3D scene, optional Veo 3 walkthrough video, optional Claw3D browser presentation.

client.notes: Common-space entry areas at Anna's Farm. Site contact is a resident who lives on the property. HOA-style proposal assumed — confirm whether the invoice goes to an HOA, builder, property manager, or individual.

location.climate_zone: Colorado Front Range high-plains semi-arid steppe (NOT Sonoran desert). USDA hardiness ~5b/6a. 300+ days sun, winter snow, alpine back-drop at sunset.
location.source: Owner provided decimal-degree coordinates 2026-04-11; Lafayette CO confirmed by Primrose School of Lafayette + Highgate Lane street labels visible in video frames perimeter_04 and perimeter_07 (see reference/from_video/site1/, site2/).
gis_sources_planned: Boulder County GIS Open Data — parcel + zoning + aerial — https://opendata-bouldercounty.hub.arcgis.com/
OpenStreetMap Overpass — street network (Highgate Lane etc.)
Google Street View / Mapillary — ground-level reference

polygon_edit_session.tool: Google Earth Pro / web — polygon path tool
polygon_edit_session.notes: Video is a 19.8-minute screen recording (CleanShot) of an owner polygon-editing session in Google Earth. Site 1 polygon reaches exact 3500 sqft / 230 ft perimeter; Site 2 polygon is being reduced toward 1500 sqft target and sits at 1567 sqft at time of handoff.

sites.name: Site One — Common Space Entry A
sites.shape: irregular polygon (NOT a rectangle — owner-edited Google Earth polygon)

sites.name: Site Two — Common Space Entry B
sites.shape: irregular polygon (NOT a rectangle — owner-edited Google Earth polygon)
sites.area_sqft_note: Polygon still being reduced toward 1500 sqft target; current edit state is 1567 sqft and needs to come down another 67 sqft. Line items quoted against the 1500 sqft target.

totals.deposit_terms: 10% deposit, 40% at startup, 40% at 90% completion, 10% punch list

style_direction.aesthetic: Colorado Front Range high-plains xeriscape, low-water residential hardscape, HOA-appropriate common-entry. NOT Sonoran desert.
regional_cues: Flatirons / Front Range alpine backdrop at horizon for hero shots
Front Range light quality — clean high-altitude air, cool shadows
Lafayette CO architectural context — suburban single-family + townhomes, medium-density
Adjacent vegetation may include cottonwood, blue spruce, scrub oak, prairie grasses

palette.ground: warm tan / buff Colorado decomposed granite or 3/4"–1 1/2" gold and buff path stone
palette.accent_rock: rust, ochre, umber 2"–6" river cobble or moss-rock rip-rap
palette.boulders: weathered Colorado moss rock / rose quartzite / Estes red sandstone, ochre to deep red-brown, lichen-dappled
palette.flagstone: buff Lyons sandstone or Colorado red flagstone, cleft face

style_direction.vegetation: Scope is hardscape only — no sod, no planting, no irrigation. Mockups may include existing adjacent Front Range vegetation (blue grama, rabbitbrush, scrub oak, cottonwood) for context.

mockup_shots.label: Completed install — wide daytime (matches before framing)
Dusk / blue hour — solar lights glowing

walkthrough_video.style: slow cinematic push-in from entry approach to full reveal, native ambient audio

pascal_editor.use: If the Pascal editor integration is confirmed, author one parametric template and expose brief.json fields as editor parameters.

reasoning_engine_notes.use: Route the brief through the Pixeltable RAG + doc_query loop to pull any relevant prior projects, material pricing references, and HOA design guidance before authoring prompts.
reasoning_engine_notes.critique_loop: After mockups land on disk, run the visual critique pipeline (Gemma4-Visual-Agent) and feed the JSON back into the next prompt iteration.

open_questions_for_owner: Client name, email, phone, billing address — for the proposal header.
Contractor company name, contact, email, phone, license #, logo, brand colors — for the header and footer.
Street address for Anna's Farm (coordinates confirmed as Lafayette CO — just need a mailing address for the invoice header).
Confirm Site 2 should be billed at 1,500 sqft (current polygon edit is 1,567; still reducing 67 sqft).
Colorado sales tax / contractor-use tax rate — or is this project tax-exempt?
Deposit / payment terms (e.g., 50% down, 50% on completion)?
Optional upsells to include as line items: irrigation, metal edging, planting, artificial turf, Blackstone patio?
Do you want me to fetch Google Street View of the two entry areas, or will you upload reference photos yourself?
